hypotheses.hypothesis: entity 5594 was never created in the stream
entity 5594 was created under another serial/generation
hypotheses.evidence: No prior CREATE/register for index 5594 was observed; UPDATE carries only index in this parser model.

hypotheses.hypothesis: entity 5594 was created and incorrectly removed
the failing decoded index is wrong due to delta accumulation
the failing operation is misclassified as UPDATE
a full refresh is incorrectly treated as delta
an enter-PVS operation is incorrectly treated as update-only
hypotheses.evidence: The parser operation enum exposes UPDATE/LEAVE/CREATE/DELETE only; no independent enter-PVS marker was found in the envelope.

hypotheses.hypothesis: a registry reset is applied without corresponding repopulation
parser keys by index when protocol requires index plus serial
hypotheses.evidence: CREATE includes serial; UPDATE uses index only and successful controls satisfy that invariant.

hypotheses.hypothesis: parser keys by packed handle when update provides index only
hypotheses.evidence: Demo.getEntity uses index; getEntityByHandle is not used in PacketEntities UPDATE.

hypotheses.hypothesis: state instrumentation in task 050 observed the wrong registry
hypotheses.evidence: Task 050 final/control snapshots reported zero registry counts; this diagnostic validates registry visibility using stream-time demo.getStats() samples and register/delete hooks.

hypotheses.hypothesis: replay 006 uses a lifecycle path not covered by current tests
hypotheses.evidence: Replay 006 is the only failing eligible replay; no prior CREATE for the UPDATE was observed by current operation decoder.

hypotheses.hypothesis: the stream legitimately references a missing entity and requires generic stale-reference tolerance
hypotheses.evidence: Controls did not show missing UPDATE preconditions; no protocol evidence yet permits treating this as harmless stale reference.
